seoTitle: Garradunga vs Gatton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Garradunga and Gatton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Garradunga and Gatton.
heading: Garradunga vs Gatton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Garradunga, Queensland and Gatton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Garradunga has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gatton (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Garradunga or Gatton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Garradunga has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Gatton scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Garradunga scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Gatton scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Garradunga or Gatton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Garradunga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
